H4: Search ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== H1: Custom Outdoor Banner Frame Small Kit for Professional Display Installation H2: Premium Aluminum Frame with Custom Printed Banners - Built for Outdoor Durability H2: Outdoor Banner Frame Small Kit with Professional Installation Features H2: Aluminum Frame Material for Outdoor Banner Frame Displays H2: Production Times for Custom Banner Frame Printing H2: Payment Options for Outdoor Banner Frame Orders H2: Shipping Guidelines for Banner Frame Delivery H2: Artwork Requirements for Custom Banner Frame Printing H2: Order Your Custom Outdoor Banner Frame Kit Today ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Outdoor Banner Frame Small Kit for Professional Display Installation ## Premium Aluminum Frame with Custom Printed Banners - Built for Outdoor Durability PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: Product Selection: Quantity: Size Options (H x W): PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Small Kit with Professional Installation Features

The Outdoor Banner Frame - Small is designed to hold one or two custom banners with professional-grade aluminum construction. This complete kit features quick and easy assembly for professional installations, trade shows, and outdoor advertising displays.

Each kit includes a durable aluminum frame, bungee cords for secure banner attachment, ground stakes for outdoor stability, and a convenient nylon carrying case for transport. The frame accommodates full-color custom vinyl banners measuring 33" x 46".

Perfect for retail displays, event marketing, construction site signage, and trade show presentations. The lightweight aluminum construction provides excellent portability while maintaining structural integrity in outdoor conditions.

Pricing includes the complete Outdoor Banner Frame hardware and your choice of (1) or (2) full-color custom printed 33" x 46" vinyl banners with professional finishing.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Aluminum Frame Material for Outdoor Banner Frame Displays

Our 13 oz vinyl banner material is the professional standard for banner frame applications, engineered for both indoor and outdoor installations. This heavy-duty vinyl provides excellent durability and weather resistance for long-term outdoor display use.

The aluminum frame construction offers lightweight portability combined with structural strength for professional installations. All hardware components are designed for repeated assembly and disassembly without compromising stability.

Important Sizing Information: Exact banner dimensions cannot be guaranteed due to vinyl's temperature-sensitive properties. Heat application during printing, finishing processes, and outdoor climate conditions can cause material fluctuation. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (example: a 5-foot banner could have a 2.5-inch variance).

For applications requiring precise measurements, please contact Customer Service at (320) 391-5300 to discuss your specific installation requirements.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Assembly & Installation Options

Each Outdoor Banner Frame Small kit includes professional-grade finishing components for secure installation:

  • Aluminum Frame Components: Pre-engineered for quick assembly without tools
  • Bungee Cord Attachment System: Provides secure banner mounting with tension adjustment
  • Ground Stakes: Heavy-duty stakes for stable outdoor installation
  • Nylon Carrying Case: Professional transport and storage solution

The modular frame design allows for single or double banner configurations, providing flexibility for various display applications. All components are designed for weather resistance and repeated use.

Frame assembly typically takes 5-10 minutes and requires no special tools or expertise. The system is designed for trade show professionals, retailers, and outdoor advertising applications.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Banner Frame Printing

We provide flexible production time ranges for your custom banner frame orders, with turnaround options from 2 to 5 business days to meet your project deadlines.

2 Business Days Express

Perfect for urgent display needs and time-sensitive installations. Express production ensures your banner frame kit ships quickly while maintaining quality standards.

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option, providing fast turnaround at no additional charge. Ideal for most commercial and trade show applications.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for projects with flexible timelines. Same quality production with additional time savings.

Production Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day
  • Emergency same-day service available in select cases - contact Customer Service
  • Production time begins after file upload completion and approval
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Frame Payment & Ordering Options

All banner frame orders require payment prior to production to ensure immediate processing of your custom printing and assembly.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Corporate accounts available for qualifying businesses

Credit cards are charged only after final order approval and artwork confirmation. This ensures complete accuracy before production begins.

For check payments, please allow additional processing time for payment clearance before production scheduling. View detailed check payment information.

Corporate billing arrangements are available for qualifying business accounts. Contact Customer Service at (320) 391-5300 to establish business payment terms.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Frame Delivery

Standard shipping for banner frame kits is via UPS Ground unless expedited service is requested. All orders include tracking information once shipped.

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Economy Shipping (5-10 Business Days)
  • Standard Shipping (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day Shipping (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day Shipping (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight Shipping (1 Business Day)

Shipping Calculations: Rates are determined by package weight and destination. Banner frame kits may incur additional shipping charges due to size and weight.

International Shipping: Available via USPS and UPS with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Contact Customer Service for international shipping requirements.

After shipment, all carrier terms and conditions apply. Damaged items must be returned for replacement. Lost packages are replaced after carrier confirmation (typically 7-10 business days after scheduled delivery).

For shipping questions, contact Customer Service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Display Applications for Outdoor Banner Frames

The Outdoor Banner Frame Small kit is engineered for versatile professional display applications:

Trade Show & Event Marketing

  • Portable booth displays and product showcases
  • Registration and directional signage
  • Sponsor recognition displays
  • Conference and seminar branding

Retail & Commercial Applications

  • Storefront promotional displays
  • Seasonal sales and marketing campaigns
  • Grand opening and special event signage
  • Shopping center and mall displays

Outdoor Advertising & Construction

  • Construction site identification and safety signage
  • Real estate development marketing
  • Municipal and government announcements
  • Festival and community event displays

The lightweight aluminum construction and included carrying case make this kit ideal for applications requiring frequent transport and setup at multiple locations.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Custom Banner Frame Printing

Recommended File Formats: Vector-based files print with optimal quality, including .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) files with fonts converted to outlines. High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files also produce excellent results.

File Upload Specifications:

  • Maximum file size: 60 MB for online uploads
  • Minimum resolution: 300 DPI for photographic content
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed area: 0.125" bleed recommended for full-coverage designs

Professional Design Services: Our in-house graphic design team can create custom artwork or enhance existing files. Design services include layout creation, image enhancement, and brand integration.

Order Proofs: Request a digital proof to review artwork, verify order details, and confirm pricing before production. Orders with requested proofs will not enter production until written approval is received.

Color Matching: For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction. Contact Customer Service for color matching specifications and requirements.

Files larger than 60 MB can be submitted via alternative methods - contact Customer Service for large file transfer instructions.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Outdoor Banner Frame Kit Today

Ready to create professional displays with custom banner frame printing? Our complete kit includes everything needed for immediate installation: durable aluminum frame, custom printed banners, mounting hardware, and carrying case.

Choose from multiple production speeds to meet your project timeline, with express options available for urgent display needs. Our professional design team can create custom artwork or work with your existing files.

Complete Kit Includes:

  • Aluminum frame components with quick assembly design
  • One or two custom printed 33" x 46" vinyl banners
  • Bungee cords and mounting hardware
  • Ground stakes for outdoor stability
  • Professional nylon carrying case

Perfect for trade shows, retail displays, outdoor advertising, and construction site signage. The portable design and professional finish make this kit ideal for businesses requiring frequent display setup at multiple locations.

Contact Customer Service at (320) 391-5300 for custom quotes, bulk pricing, or technical specifications for specialized applications.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions - Outdoor Banner Frames

What's included with the Outdoor Banner Frame Small kit?

Each kit includes the aluminum frame components, one or two custom printed 33" x 46" vinyl banners, bungee cords for attachment, ground stakes for stability, and a nylon carrying case for transport.

How long does assembly take?

The frame typically assembles in 5-10 minutes with no special tools required. The design is engineered for quick setup at trade shows and outdoor events.

Can I use this frame for indoor displays?

Yes, the banner frame is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. The ground stakes can be omitted for indoor applications, and the frame will stand securely on flat surfaces.

What happens if my banner gets damaged?

Replacement banners can be ordered separately to fit your existing frame hardware. Contact Customer Service for replacement banner pricing and specifications.

Is the frame reusable with new banners?

Absolutely. The aluminum frame is designed for repeated use. You can order replacement banners as your marketing needs change while keeping the same frame hardware.

What file formats work best for printing?

Vector files (.eps, .ai) with outlined fonts produce the best results. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files (300 DPI or higher) also print excellently.

Can you match specific brand colors?

Yes, our Color Match Proof System can accommodate color-critical projects. Contact Customer Service to discuss specific color matching requirements and Pantone specifications.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
